name: wxcode-admin-aurora-analytics
title: Aurora Admin
description: Light-mode admin aesthetic: crisp white-and-slate canvas, indigo-violet accent ramp, clean Inter type, subtle card shadows, and soft 12px radius panels. Archetype = fixed 240px sidebar with grouped nav + sticky topbar (search + actions + avatar) + 4 KPI cards with inline sparklines + primary area chart + records table + right-rail side panel (donut + insight bullets + activity feed), plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced

query.en: Apply this light indigo admin aesthetic to my domain — white canvas, indigo-violet accent, fixed sidebar with grouped nav, sticky topbar, 4 KPI cards with sparklines, an area chart, a records table, and a right-rail side panel, plus list / form / detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个浅色靛蓝风格应用到我的领域：白色画布、靛蓝紫罗兰强调色、带分组导航的固定侧边栏、吸顶顶栏、4 个带迷你折线图的 KPI 卡片、面积图、记录表格和右侧边栏，以及配套的列表 / 表单 / 详情页面。
